search_queries: SSA full retirement age year of birth table
SSA retirement benefits 2026 full retirement age by year of birth
SSA normal retirement age year of birth
contract_notes: This contract is for retirement and spousal full retirement age rules only, not survivor full retirement age.
Encode the January 1 rule explicitly with january_1_births_use_prior_year = true.
Represent the table as contiguous birth-year ranges using birth_year_min and birth_year_max, with the first rule open on the lower bound and the final rule open on the upper bound.
